portfolio.title: SpotVibe
portfolio.description: A React Native app that uses location to find nearby events, activities and venues based on your vibe. Live on iOS App Store and Google Play.

portfolio.title: Admin Dashboard
portfolio.description: A real-time admin panel for managing events, users, and analytics across platforms. Built for SpotVibe with full CRUD and role-based access.

portfolio.title: Credo Mutwa Village
portfolio.description: A cultural village website showcasing the heritage, art, and legacy of Credo Mutwa in Soweto. Features virtual tours and event listings.

portfolio.title: Joburg Theatre
portfolio.description: A vibrant theatre venue website featuring upcoming shows, events, and ticket booking for the iconic Johannesburg theatre.

portfolio.title: Soweto Equestrian
portfolio.description: An equestrian centre website offering horse riding services, lessons, and events in Soweto. Built with a clean, modern design.

services.title: Mobile Apps
services.desc: Cross-platform React Native & Expo apps with real-time features, push notifications, and app store deployment.

services.title: Web Platforms
services.desc: High-performance SPAs, admin dashboards, and marketing sites with modern React and TypeScript.

services.title: Data Analytics
services.desc: Custom dashboards, reporting, and data visualisation tailored to your business needs for data-driven decisions.

services.title: Backend Systems
services.desc: REST & real-time APIs with .NET Core, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure on GCP and Firebase.

services.title: UI/UX Design
services.desc: Clean, accessible interfaces with thoughtful animations, responsive layouts, and user-centred design.

team.name: Siyabonga Hadebe
team.description: 7+ years building full-stack apps. Previously Senior Frontend Developer at Platform45, Senior Software Engineer at Singular Systems. Built and launched SpotVibe on the iOS App Store.

team.name: Sibongiseni Buthelezi
team.description: Senior C# Developer building Practice Manager Pro for the legal industry. 6 years as Senior Software Developer at JSE. BRICS Future Skills Challenge expert in data science.

team.name: Quentin Manamela
team.description: Senior Software Engineer at Signant Health working on clinical trial technologies. Previously Senior Frontend Developer at Platform45. WeThinkCode graduate.

pricing.title: Mobile Apps
pricing.description: Android & iOS — cross-platform. Working prototype with core features delivered within a month. Built with Expo and native modules.

pricing.description: Responsive, modern websites delivered within a week. Single-page or multi-page, fully functional and ready to deploy.

features.desc: Purely static images and assets. Ideal for brochure sites and landing pages.
